---
title: "360° Business Intelligence - Statistical Analysis"
author: "Manav"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# 1. Introduction

This report performs statistical analysis on business data including sales, profit, and discount behavior. The objective is to validate business insights and support data-driven decision-making.

# 2. Load Libraries

---
title: "360° Business Intelligence - Statistical Analysis"
author: "Manav"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# 1. Introduction

This report performs statistical analysis on business data including sales, profit, and discount behavior. The objective is to validate business insights and support data-driven decision-making.

# 2. Load Libraries

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
library(cluster)

data <- read_excel("C:/Users/manav/Desktop/360 BI data.xls")
head(data)

# Remove missing values
data <- na.omit(data)

# Convert postal code to character (avoid warnings)
if("Postal Code" %in% colnames(data)){
  data$`Postal Code` <- as.character(data$`Postal Code`)
}

summary(data)

ggplot(data, aes(x = Sales)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Sales Distribution")

ggplot(data, aes(x = Discount, y = Profit)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Profit vs Discount")


data$High_Discount <- ifelse(data$Discount > 0, "Yes", "No")

t_test_result <- t.test(Profit ~ High_Discount, data = data)
t_test_result

numeric_data <- data %>% select(Sales, Profit, Discount)

cor_matrix <- cor(numeric_data)
cor_matrix

corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "circle")

model <- lm(Sales ~ Profit + Discount, data = data)
summary(model)

set.seed(123)

cluster_data <- data %>% select(Sales, Profit)

kmeans_model <- kmeans(cluster_data, centers = 3)

data$Cluster <- kmeans_model$cluster

ggplot(data, aes(x = Sales, y = Profit, color = factor(Cluster))) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Customer Segmentation")
